3293060.name: Fast Lap Racing
3293060.description:
Fast Lap Racing is a game developed for car, engine, racing, and speed enthusiasts.

OBJECTIVE

Set the best possible lap time on challenging tracks and dominate the global track rankings! Challenge your skills and have fun driving street cars on detailed circuits.

PHYSICS

It combines realism with a fun driving feel, where each vehicle has its own physics and handling, accurately replicating:

  • Engine parameters.

  • Suspension system.

  • Electronic systems.

  • Aerodynamics impact.

  • Tire friction on the ground.

FEATURES

  • A wide variety of cars, from popular models to high-performance sports cars.

  • Various circuits, including go-kart tracks and race tracks.

  • Detailed cockpit view.

  • Car customization.

  • Global ranking.

CUSTOMIZATION

Customize your car's appearance with:

  • Paintings

  • Wheels

  • Suspension adjustments

  • Window tint

Increase car performance with mechanical parts such as:

  • Air filters

  • Exhaust systems

  • Remapping

  • Turbochargers

  • Weight reduction

  • Brakes

  • Tires

Accelerate, push your limits, and prove that you're the fastest on the track!
3293060.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 土耳其语
